name: Militarist
effect: Weapons and Warrior units cost 1 less gold to buy from the market (minimum 1). Units with seeding deck cost 1 less gold to deploy.
text: Strengthen your army through economic advantage.
seeding_effect: Before Claim begins you may swap one card from your market deck or prospect deck with a Fortified location or Warrior unit in the Arena.

name: Diplomat
effect: First Buy each turn costs 1 less gold for Politician units and Accessory items (minimum 1).
seeding_effect: During Claim you may swap one card from your market deck with a card in the Arena before picking.
actions: Negotiate:0:Pay 1 gold to prevent one combat at a location where you have a unit. Cannot be used if you initiated the attack. Once per turn.

name: Scholar
effect: Draw +1 card at start of turn.
seeding_effect: After deck construction look at the top 5 cards of your main deck and reorder them.
actions: Investigate:1:Look at one face-down dilemma at any mission location.

name: Pioneer
effect: Your units' first Move each turn costs 0 AP.
seeding_effect: When you place a location on the grid you may rotate one adjacent location.
actions: Surveil:1:Rotate any location on the grid that has one of your units on it.

name: Industrialist
effect: Start with +5 gold. First Buy each turn costs 1 less gold (minimum 1).
actions: Requisition:3:Draw 1 card from your market deck directly into your hand.

name: Spymaster
effect: Your traps use decoy tokens — place a target token on the real target and one decoy on another valid target. Opponents do not know which is real.
seeding_effect: You choose which 2 of your 10 drawn cards go to the Arena (instead of the last 2 drawn).

name: Warlord
effect: Gain 1 gold each time one of your units wins combat. Raze costs 2 AP instead of 3.
actions: Rally:1:Your killed Warrior units go to the top of your main deck instead of your discard pile until end of turn.

name: Healer
effect: Gain 1 gold each time you heal a unit (via Heal keyword or HQ auto-heal).
text: Every life saved is a battle won.
seeding_effect: Place 1 fewer card in Arena (draw 10 keep 9 Arena 1).
actions: Triage:1:Heal all friendly units at one location.
